description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish documentation that triggers on push to the master branch and tags starting with v*. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with write permission to repository contents, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies, build documentation with make html, and deploy it to the gh-pages branch. Update the gh-pages branch by checking out the branch, committing changes with a version-specific directory, and pushing changes using a GitHub token.
